nodes.name: Ayacucho antpitta
nodes.summary: Ayacucho antpitta（Ayacucho antpitta，学名 Grallaria ayacuchensis），主要分布于次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: That species inhabits the understory of humid montane forest and secondary forest, heavy with moss and epiphytes, where it favors stands of bamboo and other dense undergrowth

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: That species inhabits the understory of humid montane forest and secondary forest, heavy with moss and epiphytes, where it favors stands of bamboo and other dense undergrowth

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Grallaria blakei |article-number=e.T22703327A216684003 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-2.RLTS.T22703327A216684003.en}} "The primary threat, at least in the short term, to Ayacucho Antpitta, is habitat destruction primarily through clearing for crops and grazing."
